name: MOF-Sleuth: Tool-Grounded Reward Alignment for Explainable Fine-Grained MOF CIF Auditing

description: arXiv:2607.19935v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Large metal-organic framework (MOF) databases support simulation, screening, and machine learning through crystallographic information files (CIFs). LLM advances in computational chemistry offer paths beyond predictive screening to...
author: Yu Liu, Zhiwei Yang, Diandian Guo, Kun Peng, Fangfang Yuan, Cong Cao, Chaozhuo Li, Zhiyuan Ma, Yanbing Liu, Guobin Zhao
